mapper.select: SELECT user_id, username,password,nickname, avatar,email,phone,create_time, update_time,user_type FROM `user`
SELECT user_id, username,password,nickname, avatar,email,phone,create_time, update_time,user_type FROM `user` WHERE user_id=#{id}

SELECT user_id, username,password,nickname, avatar,email,phone,create_time, update_time,user_type FROM `user`
AND user_id = #{userId}
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nickname}, '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE `user` SET username=#{username}, password=#{password}, nickname=#{nickname}, avatar=#{avatar}, email=#{email}, phone=#{phone}, update_time = NOW(), user_type=#{userType} WHERE user_id=#{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, username, password, email, nickname, avatar, phone, create_time, update_time, user_type FROM `user` WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT user_id, username, password, nickname, email, phone, create_time, update_time, user_type FROM `user` WHERE username = #{username}
